name: status-line
description: Additive status line with green-to-red gradient indicators for context window and 5h / 7d rate-limit quotas. Single-process (node only). Configurable ordered elements (ctx / 5h / 7d / model / dir / branch / eta / status / pr / gap), switchable via /statusline-mode; `pr` lists the session's pull requests (clickable) inline, wrapping onto extra rows below when they don't all fit the window width; `eta` shows when the current ticket's estimated production finishes (estimate cached via /statusline-estimate, produced time from the memory plugin). A Nerd Font is recommended for the powerline glyphs. Run /install-statusline once to enable.
